calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge
Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn,
Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Giselle Casey, CSR#8098.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Elva Recinos.
Declaration pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Midland
Funding LLC and against Defendant Elva Recinos as follows:
Principal $ 5130.55
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $290.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $5420.55

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
